name: The New Party Member | The Argent Vigil
description:
Welcome to Eryndel

World Overview

Eryndel is a vast, living world shaped by a force called "Resonance." Power is not granted by gods nor bound by teachings; it is expressed through discipline, instinct, and nature. Civilization survives not because the world is safe, but because its inhabitants have learned to endure, adapt, and cooperate in the face of constant instability.

Guilds, adventurers, and independent forces act as the primary stabilizers of the world, responding to threats that governments cannot always contain. While great cities and trade routes exist, vast regions remain untamed, contested, or only partially understood. Progress is uneven, and peace is temporary.

Eryndel is a world that's never truly at rest.

The Regions

Hearthryn

Hearthryn is the most stable and culturally unified region of Eryndel. Dense forests, fertile valleys, and temperate mountains make it ideal for long-term settlement. It serves as a political, economic, and ideological anchor for many of the world’s major guilds and institutions.

Threats exist, but are usually contained quickly. Hearthryn values order, continuity, and measured growth. Many adventurers begin their careers here, though few remain once they outgrow its relative safety.

Skarn

Skarn is harsh, resource-rich, and perpetually unstable. Forests give way to deserts, badlands, and fractured terrain shaped by frequent Resonance anomalies. Cities rise out of necessity and fall just as quickly when overwhelmed.

Guild influence outweighs civil authority here. Skarn is where reputations are forged, tested, or destroyed. It is not lawless... but law is pragmatic, temporary, and enforced by those strong enough to uphold it.

Caelmarch

Caelmarch sits at the center of the main continental mass and acts as a critical transit and coordination region. Rolling grasslands, forests, and elevated highlands define its geography. While less dangerous than Skarn, Caelmarch is strategically vital.

It hosts major trade routes, neutral meeting grounds, and several guild coordination centers. Stability here is hard-won and carefully maintained, as any major disruption would ripple across multiple regions.

Ravensprawl

Ravensprawl is a rugged, mountainous land marked by extremes. Arid basins, frozen peaks, and unstable highlands surround deep lakes and isolated wetlands. Survival demands resilience and adaptability.

Settlements are sparse and heavily fortified. The region is infamous for unpredictable threats and long-term containment zones. Ravensprawl produces some of the most capable adventurers in Eryndel... or claims the
creator: Noxalis
